title: Ricochet Home | Best Consignment Shop Software | Ricochet POS

headers.text: Consignment Software that is Ready for Anything
Hardware Options that Work for You
Merchant Services that Serve Your Needs
Sell Online with the Platforms You Want

Want to try it out for yourself? Start your free trial
                    today!

paragraphs:
Building your dream store begins with choosing
                the right software. Ricochet has been helping store owners run successful consignment shops since
                2013.
Ricochet understands that consignment stores are tired of being overcharged and undersupported. We designed our pricing to meet the needs of every store.
Run sales from PC, MAC, and iPad. Discount items, utilize our rewards program, and offer to print, email, or text receipts.
Consigned, resale, and retail inventory. Assign commission splits or costs to items or add categories or variants. Print labels from a MAC, PC, or iPad.
View sales trends and margins with our Reports Dashboard. Get a full breakdown of sales in our reporting section, or send your sales and payout data to QuickBooks.
Keep track of each consignor and customer. Give them access to Ricochet GO™. Allow them to add their inventory or receive notifications when items have sold.
Sell your items through your Ricochet webstore or integrate your Shopify account. Quickly add items and receive in-app alerts when online sales occur.
Let your consignors know that payouts are ready with a notification from the Ricochet GO™ app. Print checks, issue store credit, or offer direct deposit with Ricochet ACH.
Build your checkout and inventory stations around your store's process. Ricochet offers fully compatible solutions for iPad, MAC and PC desktops and laptops.
Accept credit cards with Ricochet Pay™ seamlessly. The true merchant service solution for the consignment industry gives stores the all-in-one checkout process they need.
Reach new customers, reach new heights. Build and manage your Ecommerce in one platform using Ricochet Web, or integrate your current Shopify™ website.
© 2026 Fullsteam Software Holdings LLC DBA Ricochet
